{{Infobox technique
| name = Ruler techniques
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ruler]] techniques are a specialized ability used by [[sacred artists]] to manipulate compatible [[aura]] within their environment. Unlike other abilities, these techniques allow a user to command the fundamental principles of the world, effectively granting them authority over their surroundings. While anyone can potentially learn them regardless of birth, mastering these techniques requires significant concentration and time to build, making them slower to deploy than standard [[Striker techniques]]. These abilities can manifest in various forms, such as creating illusions that directly affect the eyes and mind, manipulating physical elements like fire or stone, or even affecting an opponent's internal biology by seizing their blood or heart. Some techniques are designed to conquer or dominate, while others can create complex effects like spatial manipulation, the summoning of objects, or the generation of hazardous gases that cause paralysis and seizures. The potency of a [[Ruler technique]] often increases the longer it is maintained, and they can be integrated with other disciplines like [[Forger]] or [[Enforcer techniques]] to create multifaceted effects. Ultimately, these techniques represent a level of power that allows a practitioner to command the world around them.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Anyone can learn [[Ruler techniques]] out in the wild.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Ruler techniques]] are used by [[madra]] to control [[aura]], which in turn controls nature.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Ruler techniques]] conquer.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] used [[Ruler techniques]] in her match.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace towers]] are raised with [[Ruler techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ziel]] suggests [[Ruler techniques]] are best for the target.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Silent Herald]] used [[Ruler techniques]] to round up attackers.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Ruler techniques would be best for such a big target.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
